title: cyathella cathayensis
intro: Cyathella cathayensis, also known as Chinese club moss, is a species of lycopod that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyathella cathayensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote healing, while also acting as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. The herbal preparations of Cyathella cathayensis include dried leaves and roots that can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
